The Operator's Questions: 1. Am I authorized?2. Am I legally protected?3. Is the scene safe?4. Who is in charge?5. Am I physically prepared?6. How should I record this?7. What is my "Time Budget"?8. Can everyone hear me?9. Should I walk away?
What Goes In (Content): * Legal/Admin: Waivers, Land-owner permission, and Insurance data.* Documentation: Photo/Video angle guide (4-corner method).* PPE Checklist: Gloves, eye-pro, footwear, high-vis.* Comm-Check: Radio channel assignment and "Repeat-Back" verbal protocol.* Environment Scan: Lightning/Storm proximity, "Minutes to Sunset" chart, and Tide tables (if coastal).* Hierarchy: IC (Incident Commander) identification and Spotter placement.
What Should NOT Go Here: * Mud/Soil Physics: (That is Baseline).* Winch Pulling Capacity: (That is Component).* Pulley/Block Placement: (That is Design).* Math/Vectors: (That is Engineer).
